subject: Two Super Saiyan figures side by side channeling a combined energy beam — adult and younger humanoid
suspected_ip: Son Goku and Son Gohan (Dragon Ball Z)
description: Two Super Saiyan humanoid figures are depicted together in a dynamic composition. Both figures have golden spiky Super Saiyan hair and are posed in the classic Kamehameha channeling stance — hands extended forward and together. The figure on the left appears larger and older; the figure on the right appears younger and smaller in proportion. A powerful golden-white energy beam or blast radiates forward from their combined effort. The background is an intense yellow-white energy wash. No individual weapons are present — the attack is the shared energy technique itself.
foreground: two Super Saiyan figures in Kamehameha channeling stance, golden energy beam
emotion: unified determination, joint effort, father-son bond under pressure
